title: La vida alrededor
writer: Fernando Fernán Gómez, Manuel Pilares, Florentino Soria
actors: Analía Gadé, Fernando Fernán Gómez, Manolo Morán
plot: Josefina and Antonio have reached a delicate economic balance after their marriage. His salary of attorney and her wages from the hospital allowing them to survive and fantasize about some whim. But the situation will be more comp...
